name: Pumpkin Cookies/Sue
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cream together shortening and sugar. Add pumpkin, egg, and vanilla, mixing well. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice into the mixture and stir in raisins and nuts. Drop cookies onto a well-greased cookie sheet and bake for about 15 minutes.
